top_signals.title: As bee population collapses, U.S. apiarists fear research cuts
top_signals.summary: America's beekeepers are losing colonies at record rates, and many fear the shutdown of a key USDA bee lab will make the crisis even harder to contain.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
